cross_scene_arcs.title: Bond with Tuvia
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Asael's relationship with Tuvia evolves from dependent clinging after his parents' death to loyalty during brotherly conflict, then disillusionment over leadership flaws, and finally mutual respect as Asael proves his capability.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Clinging to Tuvia as a protector and father figure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tuvia acknowledges Asael as a man and leader, restoring their bond.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Estrangement from brother Zus and underlying family tensions.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Leadership and Combat Evolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Asael grows from a voice in survival decisions and group identity formation to an active participant in violence, then to an evacuation leader, battlefield commander, and strategist for group survival.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Supports raiding for food and helps define the group's identity.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Takes command in crises, organizes defenses, and leads the group through dangerous terrain.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ensuring the group's continued safety against enemy forces.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Personal Tragedy and Fate
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Asael experiences the trauma of losing his parents, finds personal joy in marrying Chaya, and ultimately meets his death after joining the Russian Army.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Overwhelmed by grief and horror at his parents' murder.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Deceased, having served in the army and died shortly after.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Establishing Leadership in Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tuvia evolves from protecting his brothers to leading a growing group, making critical survival decisions, and establishing rules for a forest sanctuary.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Reunited with brothers, taking on a protective role.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Recognized leader managing evacuation and community rules.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rift and Reunion with Zus
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tuvia and Zus clash over strategy, leading to a split, but later reconcile and reunite after battle.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Revenge to Ethical Resistance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tuvia questions violent retaliation, commits a revenge killing, then prioritizes survival and humanity over revenge.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Advocates for ethical conduct and survival.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Building a Jewish Refuge
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tuvia leaves his wife to protect his family, expands efforts to rescue Jews, and establishes rules for a forest sanctuary.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Separated from wife, heading to family.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Leader of a welcoming Jewish community in the forest.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Sustaining the sanctuary amid overcrowding and threats.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Brotherly Bond and Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zus and Tuvia's relationship evolves from a wary reunion through clashes over survival methods and leadership, leading to separation but punctuated by acts of mutual protection in combat.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Wary reunion with tension upon Tuvia's return.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eye contact after Zus saves Tuvia from a tank, indicating an enduring but strained bond.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the brothers will fully reconcile or remain in separate groups.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Forager to Combat Leader
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zus progresses from a failed attempt to forage food to insisting on and executing successful raids for supplies and weapons, eventually leading combat assaults and gaining recognition from partisans.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Retreated without food from a hostile farmer, marked as a fugitive.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Acknowledged by Russian partisans after leading a successful grenade assault and capturing a truck.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing survival challenges and threats from enemies.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Grief-Driven Revenge
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After learning of his family's death in a massacre, Zus grieves violently and channels his guilt into pushing for revenge, confronting Tuvia over executing captives and forming a faction.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Grieving and expressing guilt over his family's death.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In conflict with Tuvia, recruiting allies for a revenge mission.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Unresolved guilt and the drive for vengeance influencing his actions.
